---
title: "01 Intro"
---

# [Week ONE]{.r-fit-text}

# Intros
- Valle: ux research director at indeed and mom.
- Mick: associate professor of instruction and dad. 
- You: say something interesting about yourself as we go around the room.

::: {.notes}
These are speaker notes
:::

# Today 
- Syllabus
- Canvas
- Mick's website
- Overview of our textbook 

##
![](fiHornbaekCover.jpg)

# Pause to look at these items

# [END]{.r-fit-text}

# Colophon

This slideshow was produced using `quarto`

Fonts are *Roboto*, *Roboto Light*, and *Victor Mono Nerd Font*
